release_notes: OLED 2.42 beta build 49. Adds a clean night glucose screen that automatically activates during the configured night-dimming window. The night screen shows only the large glucose value, trend arrows, and delta with unit for bedside readability. Keeps NO DATA handling, alarm visibility, previous top-row time/update/Wi-Fi layout, main-screen insulin/status refinements, caregiver WhatsApp routing, Wi-Fi profile improvements, and consolidated web UI structure.
